app.name: OfficeCLI
app.one_liner: OfficeCLI is the world's first and best command-line tool designed for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files without requiring Microsoft Office.

screens.name: Main CLI Interface
screens.purpose: Provide a unified command-line entry point for AI agents to control Office document operations.
primary_actions: Manage document paths and registry entries

rust_commands.name: add
rust_commands.purpose: Add or register a document path for manipulation; fails if trailing slashes are present in registry paths.

rust_commands.name: watch
rust_commands.purpose: Monitor and preview updates to Excel (.xlsx) files, though preview may appear before actual disk persistence.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add file lock conflict handling for Excel operations
week 1: Ensure headless execution without GUI dialogs
week 1: Implement core add/watch commands with path validation
acceptance_tests: CLI must operate in pure headless mode without triggering GUI dialogs during invocation.
Concurrent Excel edits by AI agents must not result in file lock conflicts.
The 'add' command must reject paths with trailing slashes and provide clear error messaging.
The 'watch' command must not indicate file updates until changes are durably written to disk.
